heading: Today
text: A few patches of fog early, then mostly sunny and warmer.  Highs in the 70s to low 80s.  Winds light, becoming south less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear.  Patches of fog forming through the river valleys.  Lows in the 50s, with some 40s in the cooler valleys, 60 to 65 near Lake Champlain.  Winds light and variable, continuing from the south near 10 mph near Lake Champlain.

heading: Saturday
text: A few patches of fog early, otherwise mostly sunny and warm.  Highs in the upper 70s and 80s.  Winds light, becoming south less than 10 mph.
